24 STATE_CD STATE_CD State Code CHAR 2 The two-digit state abbreviation.
25 SUBMSNDT SUBMSN_DT Submission Date DATE 8 The date the submission was received by the system.
26 TARGETDT TARGET_DT Target Date DATE 8 For MDS, the target date is the R4 Discharge Date for any discharge, the A4A Reentry Date for any re-entry and the A3A Assessment Reference Date for any other type of assessment.
